message.content:
### 1. Overall Layout  
The layout is a **single-column, left-aligned hero section** with a full-viewport width. The left third of the viewport contains text, while the right two-thirds features a portrait. The text and portrait are vertically aligned to the **baseline** (bottom of the viewport), with the portrait positioned to the right of the text block. No columns or grid divisions exist—content flows linearly from left to right.  


### 2. Portrait/Subject  
- **Position**: Centered vertically in the right two-thirds of the viewport, aligned to the baseline (feet touch the bottom edge).  
- **Size**: Occupies ~60% of the viewport height (from baseline to ~40% of the viewport height) and ~30% of the viewport width.  
- **Cut-off**: Waist-up (torso and head visible; legs are cropped at the hips).  
- **Background**: A **soft, diagonal striped gradient** (beige to off-white) with subtle brown/orange lines, creating a dynamic, flowing texture. The background is not transparent—solid color with gradient variation.  
- **Placement**: The subject stands upright, facing slightly left, with one hand on their chin and the other arm crossed over their torso. The portrait is **floating** (not overlapping text) and positioned to the right of the text block, with a small gap (~5% of viewport width) between the text and the subject’s left shoulder.  


### 3. Typography  
- **Visible Text**:  
  - Top-left: *"Hi, I’m John Shannon."* (small, sans-serif, gray).  
  - Below top-left: *"JOHN SHANNON RODRIGUEZ"* (uppercase, sans-serif, light gray, smaller than the main name).  
  - Below that: *"FULL-STACK WEB DEVELOPER"* (uppercase, sans-serif, orange, smaller than the main name).  
  - Main name: *"John Shannon"* (large, bold, sans-serif, black).  
  - Subname: *"Rodriguez"* (large, italic, sans-serif, orange).  
  - Body text: *"I build the load-bearing software cities and small businesses actually depend on — water bills, health records, vaccine counts, inventory and point-of-sale. Magna Cum Laude"* (small, sans-serif, gray).  
- **Sizes**:  
  - *"Hi, I’m John Shannon."*: ~14px.  
  - *"JOHN SHANNON RODRIGUEZ"*: ~12px.  
  - *"FULL-STACK WEB DEVELOPER"*: ~11px.  
  - *"John Shannon"*: ~72px (viewport height).  
  - *"Rodriguez"*: ~60px (viewport height).  
  - Body text: ~16px.  
- **Font Style**: All sans-serif (modern, clean). *"Rodriguez"* is italicized; others are regular.  
- **Colors**:  
  - *"Hi, I’m John Shannon."*: #666 (gray).  
  - *"JOHN SHANNON RODRIGUEZ"*: #999 (light gray).  
  - *"FULL-STACK WEB DEVELOPER"*: #E67E22 (orange).  
  - *"John Shannon"*: #000 (black).  
  - *"Rodriguez"*: #E67E22 (orange).  
  - Body text: #666 (gray).  
- **Placement Relative to Portrait**: Text is entirely on the **left side** of the portrait, with no overlap. The main name (*"John Shannon"*) and subname (*"Rodriguez"*) are stacked vertically, with *"Rodriguez"* slightly overlapping the bottom of the portrait’s left shoulder (by ~2% of the portrait’s width).  


### 4. Color Palette and Background  
- **Primary Palette**:  
  - Background: Beige (#F5F1E8) with diagonal brown/orange stripes (#D4B896) for texture.  
  - Text: Black (#000) for the main name, orange (#E67E22) for accents, gray (#666/#999) for secondary text.  
- **Background**: The gradient background is a soft, horizontal (diagonal) blend of beige and off-white, with subtle, thin brown lines creating a "flowing" effect. No solid colors—gradient dominates.  


### 5. UI Chrome  
- **Top-Right Navigation**:  
  - Links: *"WORK"*, *"ABOUT"*, *"CONTACT"*, *"GET IN TOUCH"* (sans-serif, gray, uppercase, ~12px).  
  - Icon: Sun/moon toggle (top-right corner, ~16px, gray).  
- **Top-Right Badge**: *"OPEN TO WORK"* (green dot + text, sans-serif, ~10px, green).  
- **Bottom-Left Icon**: "N" logo (black, ~24px, circular).  


### 6. Spacing/Whitespace Philosophy  
- **Vertical Spacing**:  
  - Top margin: ~10% of viewport height (between top edge and *"Hi, I’m John Shannon."*).  
  - Between *"Hi, I’m John Shannon."* and *"JOHN SHANNON RODRIGUEZ"*: ~5% of viewport height.  
  - Between *"JOHN SHANNON RODRIGUEZ"* and *"FULL-STACK WEB DEVELOPER"*: ~3% of viewport height.  
  - Between *"FULL-STACK WEB DEVELOPER"* and *"John Shannon"*: ~8% of viewport height.  
  - Between *"John Shannon"* and *"Rodriguez"*: ~2% of viewport height.  
  - Between *"Rodriguez"* and body text: ~10% of viewport height.  
- **Horizontal Spacing**:  
  - Left margin: ~5% of viewport width (between left edge and *"Hi, I’m John Shannon."*).  
  - Between text block and portrait: ~5% of viewport width.  
- **Whitespace**: Generous, with large gaps between text elements to emphasize hierarchy. The portrait and text are separated by a small gap, ensuring no visual clutter.  


### Precision Notes  
- The portrait’s left shoulder overlaps the bottom of *"Rodriguez"* by ~2% of the portrait’s width (subtle, not distracting).  
- The main name (*"John Shannon"*) is the largest element, with *"Rodriguez"* slightly smaller and italicized to create contrast.  
- The background gradient is consistent across the entire viewport, with no breaks or solid sections.  
- All text is left-aligned, with the portrait aligned to the right of the text block—no centering or right-alignment.  

This layout prioritizes readability and visual hierarchy, with the portrait serving as a focal point and text guiding the user’s eye from top to bottom.
